aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured data, conversational content, and authority signals. Implementing schema markup and FAQ content can significantly improve visibility.
quick_wins: Add LocalBusiness schema markup to the website.
Create an FAQ section with questions related to HVAC services and local expertise.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-rated but lacks critical details like business hours and regular posts.
critical_issues: No recent posts or Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of schema markup and conversational content makes the site less attractive to AI crawlers.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries where AI assistants prioritize structured data and authority signals.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, partnerships, and detailed service expertise to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistant queries.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The site lacks essential schema markup and FAQ content, making it less likely to be cited by AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top choice for AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing market share to them.
